scenario: Standard Response Request — field medical liaison requests the standard drug-interaction packet.
input_text:
SOURCE CHANNEL: Email (Internal Field Team)

Hi MI team,

A cardiologist on my territory asked for documentation on CholoClear-X drug interactions. Please forward the current approved Standard Response Document on interactions so I can share the pre-cleared materials. Not looking for new content — just the standard SRD.

Regards,
Marisol Vega, MSL
CardioMed Field Medical
labeling_notes: Internal MSL requesting an SRD packet — Standard Response Request, not a medical inquiry.
